sections.paragraph:
Original: בּשׂמת

Transliteration: bośmath

Phonetic: bos-math'

BDB Definition:

Bashemath or Basmath = "spice"
  1. Hittite wife of Esau, daughter of Ishmael, sister of Nebaioth
  2. daughter of Solomon, wife of Ahimaaz, one of Solomon's commissariat officers

Origin: from H1314 (the second form)

TWOT entry: fragrance

Part(s) of speech: Neuter
